member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Clients.GDrive.GDriveApiClient.WithRetryOnAuthErrorAsync``1(System.String,System.String,System.Func{Google.Apis.Drive.v3.DriveService,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Wraps a Drive API operation with automatic retry on 401/403: refreshes the OAuth token and rebuilds the DriveService, then retries the operation once.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Clients.GDrive.GDriveApiClient.ResolveFolderPathAsync(Google.Apis.Drive.v3.DriveService,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves a slash-separated folder path (e.g. "real-estate-star/edward-rosado/leads") to a Google Drive folder ID by walking each segment and finding or creating it.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Clients.GDrive.GDriveClientExtensions.AddGDriveClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers using the internal implementation. Requires to be registered first.
